creator: robin@isometry.net
text:
Please close this PR.
The last few releases have been a little rushed, and there are various
known instabilities and issues with the 1.0.rc6 release. The author is
currently working to resolve these in the 1.0.rc7 release, due out soon.
I will submit a maintainer update for 1.0.rc7 shortly after it becomes
available; until then I advise users to stick with 1.0.rc2.

Regards,
Robin
